allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; where.exe node 2>&1; where.exe npm 2>&1; Get-Command -All node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:Path -split ';' | Select-String -Pattern 'node')

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.volta" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "C:\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)
